title: Wire TaskCreateForm to board/project page — add '+ New Task' button
acceptance_criteria: The board page (/boards/board-demo) shows a '+ New Task' button in the board header area
Clicking '+ New Task' reveals the TaskCreateForm (toggle show/hide, not navigation)
Submitting the form calls POST /api/vault/tasks and on success refreshes the board page to show the new task in the 'todo' column
The form is pre-filled with the current boardId and projectId from the page context
Error messages from the API are displayed inline in the form
Cancelling the form hides it and resets all fields
completion_summary: Wired inline task creation into the board page with a + New Task toggle, context-aware defaults, cancel/reset support, inline errors, and post-create refresh.
